name: Gimme Quickdraw

title: "QUICKDRAW "
labels: free_quickdraw
---

# What you do
1. Submit this issue
2. Wait about 10 seconds
3. Close this issue
4. Add your github username here :
5. Wait for the issue to be closed
6. Go to [your settings](https://github.com/settings/profile)
7. Enable **Show achivements on my profile**

Done !
